extension.name: mod_ciwv_radiocharts
extension.author: Your Team
extension.description: Extensible radio chart dashboard and CSV manager for national, station, streaming, and custom sources.

field.name: station
field.label: Station Callsign
field.description: Station identifier for custom output, e.g. CIWV.

field.name: data_path
field.label: Data Directory
field.description: Path for uploads and processed CSV files.

field.name: allowed_csv_types
field.label: Enable Upload Types
field.description: Select allowed CSV file types to accept uploads for.

field.name: example_notice
field.label: CSV Examples Location
field.description: See /modules/mod_ciwv_radiocharts/data-examples/ for template files for each source.
